name: 🛡️ HDFC Bank — CISO Security Command Center

1.content:
# 🛡️ HDFC Bank — India's Largest Private Sector Bank
## CISO Security Command Center | Threat & Compliance

**Real-time security posture across 9,545 branches, 21,417 ATMs, and 120M+ customer accounts — D-SIB compliant**

7.query:
data record(severity="Critical", count=42),
     record(severity="High", count=127),
     record(severity="Medium", count=98),
     record(severity="Low", count=80)
| sort count desc
| fieldsKeep severity, count
7.title: Open Vulnerabilities by Severity

8.query:
data record(surface="Web Applications", exposure=28.4),
     record(surface="API Endpoints", exposure=22.1),
     record(surface="Mobile Apps", exposure=16.7),
     record(surface="Network Infra", exposure=12.3),
     record(surface="ATM / POS", exposure=8.9),
     record(surface="Third-Party", exposure=6.4),
     record(surface="Cloud Services", exposure=5.2)
| sort exposure desc
| fieldsKeep surface, exposure
8.title: Attack Surface by Category (%)

9.query:
data record(timestamp=now()-165m, series="Blocked", val=1842),
     record(timestamp=now()-165m, series="Detected", val=324),
     record(timestamp=now()-165m, series="Escalated", val=18),
     record(timestamp=now()-150m, series="Blocked", val=1920),
     record(timestamp=now()-150m, series="Detected", val=298),
     record(timestamp=now()-150m, series="Escalated", val=22),
     record(timestamp=now()-135m, series="Blocked", val=1780),
     record(timestamp=now()-135m, series="Detected", val=342),
     record(timestamp=now()-135m, series="Escalated", val=15),
     record(timestamp=now()-120m, series="Blocked", val=2040),
     record(timestamp=now()-120m, series="Detected", val=310),
     record(timestamp=now()-120m, series="Escalated", val=24),
     record(timestamp=now()-105m, series="Blocked", val=1890),
     record(timestamp=now()-105m, series="Detected", val=328),
     record(timestamp=now()-105m, series="Escalated", val=19),
     record(timestamp=now()-90m, series="Blocked", val=2150),
     record(timestamp=now()-90m, series="Detected", val=356),
     record(timestamp=now()-90m, series="Escalated", val=27),
     record(timestamp=now()-75m, series="Blocked", val=1960),
     record(timestamp=now()-75m, series="Detected", val=314),
     record(timestamp=now()-75m, series="Escalated", val=21),
     record(timestamp=now()-60m, series="Blocked", val=2210),
     record(timestamp=now()-60m, series="Detected", val=368),
     record(timestamp=now()-60m, series="Escalated", val=29),
     record(timestamp=now()-45m, series="Blocked", val=2080),
     record(timestamp=now()-45m, series="Detected", val=332),
     record(timestamp=now()-45m, series="Escalated", val=23),
     record(timestamp=now()-30m, series="Blocked", val=2280),
     record(timestamp=now()-30m, series="Detected", val=372),
     record(timestamp=now()-30m, series="Escalated", val=31),
     record(timestamp=now()-15m, series="Blocked", val=2120),
     record(timestamp=now()-15m, series="Detected", val=348),
     record(timestamp=now()-15m, series="Escalated", val=25)
| fieldsAdd val = toDouble(val)
| makeTimeseries incidents = avg(val), by: {series}, interval: 15m
9.title: Security Incidents Trend (per 15 min)

10.query:
data record(asset="Core Banking (Finacle)", risk_score=78, vulns=34, last_scan="2h ago"),
     record(asset="Mobile Banking App", risk_score=72, vulns=28, last_scan="1h ago"),
     record(asset="Net Banking Portal", risk_score=68, vulns=42, last_scan="3h ago"),
     record(asset="UPI Payment Gateway", risk_score=65, vulns=18, last_scan="45m ago"),
     record(asset="ATM Switch (Euronet)", risk_score=61, vulns=22, last_scan="4h ago"),
     record(asset="Card Management System", risk_score=58, vulns=31, last_scan="2h ago"),
     record(asset="SWIFT Gateway", risk_score=54, vulns=12, last_scan="1h ago"),
     record(asset="WhatsApp Banking API", risk_score=48, vulns=15, last_scan="30m ago"),
     record(asset="HDB Financial Services", risk_score=46, vulns=24, last_scan="5h ago"),
     record(asset="HDFC Securities Trading", risk_score=42, vulns=19, last_scan="3h ago")
| sort risk_score desc
| fieldsKeep asset, risk_score, vulns, last_scan
10.title: Top Risk Assets — Risk Score & Vulnerability Count

12.query:
data record(framework="RBI Cyber Security Framework", coverage=98.2),
     record(framework="DPDP Act 2023", coverage=94.5),
     record(framework="CERT-In Directive", coverage=97.1),
     record(framework="PCI-DSS v4.0", coverage=96.8),
     record(framework="ISO 27001:2022", coverage=99.1),
     record(framework="SWIFT CSP", coverage=97.4),
     record(framework="SOC 2 Type II", coverage=95.2),
     record(framework="SEBI Cybersec", coverage=93.8),
     record(framework="IRDAI Guidelines", coverage=91.6)
| sort coverage desc
| fieldsKeep framework, coverage
12.title: Compliance Framework Coverage (%)

13.query:
data record(category="Critical", findings=3, remediated=2, overdue=1),
     record(category="High", findings=14, remediated=11, overdue=3),
     record(category="Medium", findings=28, remediated=24, overdue=4),
     record(category="Low", findings=42, remediated=38, overdue=4),
     record(category="Informational", findings=67, remediated=65, overdue=2)
| fieldsKeep category, findings, remediated, overdue
13.title: Audit Findings — Status by Severity

14.query:
data record(timestamp=now()-165m, series="Overall", val=94.2),
     record(timestamp=now()-150m, series="Overall", val=94.8),
     record(timestamp=now()-135m, series="Overall", val=95.1),
     record(timestamp=now()-120m, series="Overall", val=95.4),
     record(timestamp=now()-105m, series="Overall", val=95.7),
     record(timestamp=now()-90m, series="Overall", val=95.9),
     record(timestamp=now()-75m, series="Overall", val=96.1),
     record(timestamp=now()-60m, series="Overall", val=96.3),
     record(timestamp=now()-45m, series="Overall", val=96.5),
     record(timestamp=now()-30m, series="Overall", val=96.6),
     record(timestamp=now()-15m, series="Overall", val=96.8)
| fieldsAdd val = toDouble(val)
| makeTimeseries compliance_score = avg(val), by: {series}, interval: 15m
14.title: Compliance Score Trend (%)

15.query:
data record(classification="Public", pct=12.4),
     record(classification="Internal", pct=34.8),
     record(classification="Confidential", pct=31.2),
     record(classification="Restricted (PII/PFI)", pct=16.8),
     record(classification="Highly Restricted (RBI)", pct=4.8)
| sort pct desc
| fieldsKeep classification, pct
15.title: Data Classification — Sensitivity Breakdown

17.query:
data record(threat="Phishing / Smishing", active=248, severity="High", trend="Rising"),
     record(threat="Card Skimming / Cloning", active=87, severity="Critical", trend="Stable"),
     record(threat="DDoS Attempts", active=12, severity="Medium", trend="Declining"),
     record(threat="Credential Stuffing", active=156, severity="High", trend="Rising"),
     record(threat="Malware / Ransomware", active=34, severity="Critical", trend="Stable"),
     record(threat="Insider Threat", active=8, severity="High", trend="Stable"),
     record(threat="API Abuse", active=92, severity="Medium", trend="Rising"),
     record(threat="Supply Chain Risk", active=14, severity="High", trend="Stable")
| sort active desc
| fieldsKeep threat, active, severity, trend
17.title: Active Threat Landscape

18.query:
data record(status="Resolved (< 4h)", pct=62.4),
     record(status="In Progress", pct=18.7),
     record(status="Escalated to CERT-In", pct=4.2),
     record(status="Awaiting Forensics", pct=8.1),
     record(status="Under Investigation", pct=6.6)
| sort pct desc
| fieldsKeep status, pct
18.title: Incident Response Status (%)

19.query:
data record(technique="Phishing (T1566)", coverage=94),
     record(technique="Brute Force (T1110)", coverage=98),
     record(technique="Exploitation (T1190)", coverage=89),
     record(technique="Lateral Movement (T1021)", coverage=86),
     record(technique="Data Exfil (T1048)", coverage=91),
     record(technique="C2 Comms (T1071)", coverage=93)
| sort coverage desc
| fieldsKeep technique, coverage
19.title: MITRE ATT&CK Coverage (%)

20.query:
data record(time="now()-2m", event="Blocked 48 phishing domains targeting HDFC Bank customers", severity="High", source="SOC / Brand Protection"),
     record(time="now()-7m", event="VAPT scan completed on Mobile Banking App v9.4 — 3 medium findings", severity="Medium", source="AppSec Team"),
     record(time="now()-12m", event="PCI-DSS v4.0 quarterly ASV scan passed — all in-scope systems compliant", severity="Low", source="Compliance"),
     record(time="now()-18m", event="Credential stuffing attack on Net Banking — 12,400 attempts blocked by WAF", severity="High", source="SOC / WAF"),
     record(time="now()-25m", event="SWIFT CSP self-attestation submitted to SWIFT — all 32 controls met", severity="Low", source="Compliance"),
     record(time="now()-33m", event="Anomalous API call pattern detected on UPI Gateway — investigation initiated", severity="High", source="API Security"),
     record(time="now()-40m", event="RBI circular on digital lending compliance — gap assessment initiated", severity="Medium", source="Regulatory"),
     record(time="now()-48m", event="ATM malware signature update deployed across 21,417 ATMs", severity="Medium", source="Endpoint Security"),
     record(time="now()-55m", event="DPDP Act consent management module deployed in Mobile App", severity="Low", source="Privacy Team"),
     record(time="now()-63m", event="Insider threat alert — unusual data access pattern by privileged user", severity="Critical", source="DLP / UEBA"),
     record(time="now()-72m", event="CERT-In mandatory incident report filed for Q1 FY26", severity="Low", source="CERT-In Liaison"),
     record(time="now()-80m", event="Third-party vendor risk assessment completed for 42 fintech partners", severity="Medium", source="Vendor Risk"),
     record(time="now()-88m", event="SOC analyst training completed — 24 analysts certified in MITRE ATT&CK", severity="Low", source="SOC Training"),
     record(time="now()-95m", event="DDoS mitigation drill completed — failover in 8.2 seconds", severity="Medium", source="Infra Security"),
     record(time="now()-110m", event="Zero-day patch deployed for Core Banking — CVE-2026-28741 (CVSS 9.1)", severity="Critical", source="Patch Mgmt")
| fieldsKeep time, event, severity, source
20.title: CISO Security Feed — Real-Time Events
